mapper.sql: i.id, i.lot_id, i.work_order_id, i.inspector_id, l.lot_number, w.wo_number, u.name AS inspector_name, i.process_type, i.inspection_item, i.spec_min, i.spec_max, i.measured_value, i.result, i.grade, i.aging_status, i.inspected_at, i.remarks, i.is_deleted, i.created_at, i.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM inspections i LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = i.lot_id LEFT JOIN work_orders w ON w.id = i.work_order_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = i.inspector_id WHERE i.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY i.inspected_at DESC, i.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM inspections i LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = i.lot_id LEFT JOIN work_orders w ON w.id = i.work_order_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = i.inspector_id WHERE i.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY i.inspected_at DESC, i.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT FROM inspections i LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = i.lot_id LEFT JOIN work_orders w ON w.id = i.work_order_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = i.inspector_id WHERE i.id = #{id} AND i.is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count, SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS grade_a_count, SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS grade_b_count, SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS grade_c_count, SUM(CASE WHEN process_type = 'IQC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS iqc_count, SUM(CASE WHEN process_type = 'IPQC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ipqc_count, SUM(CASE WHEN process_type = 'OQC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS oqc_count, SUM(CASE WHEN aging_status = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS aging_pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN aging_status = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS aging_fail_count, SUM(CASE WHEN aging_status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS aging_pending_count FROM inspections WHERE is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inspections ( id, lot_id, work_order_id, inspector_id, process_type, inspection_item, spec_min, spec_max, measured_value, result, grade, aging_status, inspected_at, remarks, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lotId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workOrderId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inspectorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inspectionItem, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{specMax, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{measuredValue, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agingStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inspectedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remarks, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{isDeleted, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE inspections SET lot_id = #{lotId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_order_id = #{workOrderId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inspector_id = #{inspectorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, process_type = #{processType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inspection_item = #{inspectionItem, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spec_min = #{specMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, spec_max = #{specMax, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, measured_value = #{measuredValue, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, result = #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, grade = #{grade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aging_status = #{agingStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inspected_at = #{inspectedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remarks = #{remarks, jdbcType=CLOB}, updated_at = #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id}
